title: Waka Waka (This Time for Africa)
why_this_song: Waka Waka (This Time for Africa) by Shakira (2010) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 16 times; first heard in: "Tsamina mina zangalewa 'cause this is Africa"

Appears 10 times; first heard in: "Waka waka, eh, eh"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Listen to your God, this is our motto
Your time to shine, don't wait in line, y vamos por todo

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "tsamina" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "tsamina" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "mina" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "mina" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: You're a good soldier, choosing your battles
If you get down get up, oh, oh

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: You're on the frontline, everyone's watching

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Waka Waka (This Time for Africa)" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Waka Waka (This Time for Africa)" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
